summary: Connection Test Detailed feature testing complete. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Connection test dialog working correctly with loading spinner, 5 colored test steps, Turkish error messages, error codes in monospace, and overall status banner.
features_tested: POST /api/channel-manager/v2/connectors/{connector_id}/test returns ConnectionTestResponse with all 5 status fields ✅
Each status object has status (pass/fail/warn), latency_ms, error_code, message fields ✅
Test result written to audit log with action=connection_tested and metadata ✅
Frontend test result dialog opens with loading spinner showing '5 farklı bağlantı noktası doğrulanıyor' ✅
Dialog shows overall success/fail banner (red for fail) with total latency (1254ms observed) ✅
Each test step shows icon, label, description, latency, error message when failed ✅
Error codes displayed in monospace font ('Hata kodu: NOT_FOUND') for failed steps ✅
Non-existent connector returns success=false with 'Connector not found' message ✅
Turkish error messages displayed ('Kaynak bulunamadı. HR ID veya endpoint doğruluğunu kontrol edin') ✅

issues: Title 'Integration Hub' has low contrast - appears faded against gradient background

critical_code_review_comments: Connection test implementation follows the spec - 5 distinct test steps each with status, latency, error_code, message
Turkish error messages properly implemented in client.py (_test_single_step method)
Audit logging correctly records connection_tested action with success/summary/latency metadata
Frontend dialog shows loading spinner followed by colored step-by-step results as specified
Error codes (NOT_FOUND, AUTH_INVALID, etc.) displayed in monospace font as specified
HotelRunner API calls use sandbox mode - 404 responses are expected behavior with test credentials

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements render correctly, dialog works, loading spinner displays)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing HotelRunner Sandbox connector
context_for_next_testing_agent: Connection test detailed feature fully operational. The test dialog shows 5 test steps (auth, property access, room types, rate plans, XML API) with colored status indicators, latency measurements in ms, Turkish error messages, and monospace error codes. All 5 steps fail with NOT_FOUND (404) because HotelRunner sandbox credentials are test values - this is expected behavior per problem statement. Audit log correctly records connection_tested entries.

mocked_integrations.note: HotelRunner API calls are real HTTP requests but sandbox URL returns 404 for test credentials - this is expected and documented
